news.Title: [AI Summary] 精材近期營收報喜股價上漲近一週漲幅逾6%，公司積極擴廠布局未來
news.Content: • 精材本週股價上漲 6.34%，主要受惠於 1 月合併營收年增 45.8% [1]。, • 公司積極進行擴廠計畫，董事會通過資本預算案，預計投入 14.08 億元進行新廠擴充及設備裝設，並訂購總金額達 9.867 億元的廠務工程。 【綜合分析】 參考來源：Yahoo奇摩股市: 7則 | 資料期間：2026-01-28 至 2026-02-10 | 新聞數量：7 則 晶圓代工廠精材 (3374) 近期股價表現強勁，截至 2026 年 2 月 11 日，最新收盤價為 176.00 元，較前一日上漲 7.65%，近一週漲幅更達 6.34%。此波股價上漲主要受惠於公司亮眼的營收表現。精材於 2026 年 2 月 10 日公告，1 月份合併營收達 6.51 億元，年增率高達 45.8% [1]。此營收成長顯示公司營運狀況持續向好。 為了因應業務發展需求，精材積極進行擴廠計畫。公司於 2026 年 2 月 5 日召開董事會，不僅通過了 114 年度財務報告 [2] 及股利分派案，預計發放每股 2.5 元的現金股利 [3]，更批准了高達 14.08 億元的新廠擴充無塵室、裝機工程及廠務設施的資本預算案，預計於 2026 年第一季至第三季執行 [4]。此外，公司也於 2 月 6 日公告訂購總金額為 9.867 億元的廠務工程，由洋基工程股份有限公司負責執行 [5]。這些大規模的投資與佈局，顯示精材對未來業務成長充滿信心。 在營運展望方面，精材將於 2026 年 2 月 10 日下午 2 點 30 分參加凱基證券舉辦的線上法說會，屆時將說明公司經營成果及營運展望 [6]，市場高度關注公司未來成長動能。整體而言，精材在營收成長、擴廠投資及股利發放等多重利多加持下，吸引市場目光，股價走勢穩健。

news.Title: [AI Summary] Xintec's Revenue Surges, Stock Rises Over 6% Weekly Amid Expansion Plans
news.Content: • Xintec's stock rose 6.34% this week, primarily boosted by a 45.8% year-on-year increase in its January consolidated revenue [1]., • The company is actively pursuing expansion plans, with its board approving a capital budget of NT$1.408 billion for new cleanroom expansion, equipment installation, and factory facilities, along with ordering factory engineering services valued at NT$986.7 million. [Analysis] Sources: Yahoo Finance Taiwan: 7 articles | Period: 2026-01-28 to 2026-02-10 | Number of articles: 7 Xintec (3374) has shown strong stock performance recently. As of February 11, 2026, its latest closing price was NT$176.00, a 7.65% increase from the previous day, and its weekly gain reached 6.34%. This stock surge is mainly attributed to the company's impressive revenue figures. On February 10, 2026, Xintec announced that its consolidated revenue for January reached NT$651 million, a significant 45.8% year-on-year increase [1], indicating continuous improvement in the company's operational performance. To accommodate business development needs, Xintec is actively engaged in expansion plans. The company's board of directors, in a meeting on February 5, 2026, not only approved the financial report for 2025 [2] and a dividend distribution plan, proposing a cash dividend of NT$2.50 per share [3], but also greenlit a capital budget of NT$1.408 billion for the expansion of new cleanrooms, equipment installation, and factory facilities, scheduled to be executed from the first to the third quarter of 2026 [4]. Furthermore, on February 6, the company announced an order for factory engineering services totaling NT$986.7 million, to be executed by Yang Ji Engineering Co., Ltd. [5]. These substantial investments and strategic deployments underscore Xintec's confidence in its future business growth. Regarding its operational outlook, Xintec is scheduled to participate in an online investor conference hosted by KGI Securities on February 10, 2026, at 2:30 PM, where it will discuss its business results and future prospects [6]. The market is keenly awaiting updates on the company's growth momentum. Overall, with the confluence of revenue growth, expansion investments, and dividend payouts, Xintec is capturing market attention, with a steady stock performance.
